data.name: Archmage Ricka
data.detailed_description:
★★「大魔法师立花」集合系列两部作品，2合1剧情，一份的价格双倍的快乐！★★

游戏剧情

『杂鱼迷宫与大魔法师』

为了追回领主贪污的非法财产，立花前去执行任务。
却落入领主提前布置的陷阱——一座地下迷宫。

虽说其中的魔物都是杂鱼般的存在，
但同时存在的各种陷阱却让逃离充满了变数！

『地下城的盗贼与大魔法师』
盗贼逃入了地下城之中。
那里是布满了陷阱与魔物的危险地带。
无法出手的士兵们只能发起悬赏。
然而无法与危险成正比的报酬并未吸引来挑战者，
……除了大魔法师立花。

游戏特色

  • 3D地下城
  • 肉鸽
  • 自动战斗

data.supported_languages:
日文*, 英文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 3+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Archmage Ricka
data.detailed_description:
Archmage Ricka is a series RPG developed by Alecubicsoft, published by OTAKU Plan. Archmage Ricka contains The Small Fry Dungeon and the Archmage, The Thief in the dungeon and the Archmage.

STORY

The Small Fry Dungeon and the Archmage
In order to retrieve the illegal property embezzled by the evil Lord, Ricka received a mission to capture the Lord.
But it was a trap. She fell into a dungeon arranged by the Lord in advance.
Although the demons in the dungeon are weak, the existence of various traps makes it difficult to escape!

The Thief in the dungeon and the Archmage
The band of thieves ran into the dungeon!
It's an underground dungeon full of traps and monsters and the soldiers can't get in there.
Finally, bounties were put on the head of the thieves. But despite the perilous mission of going through the dungeon, the reward was little and no one dared to do it.
... All except Ricka the archmage.

FEATURE

  • Cute graphic
  • 3D dungeon
  • Auto battle[/list*]
